approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight source-browser work plan: keep Browserbase as a one-month measured bakeoff only, prefer local virtual browser hands, cap API/model spend, park blockers, and move to the next scoped card if blocked.
notes: Approval is for report-only guardrails and a future tiny one-task-at-a-time bakeoff contract. It does not approve broad Browserbase extraction, paid/auth/private extraction, login/signup/purchase/download/post/comment/message actions, normal Chrome profile use, raw secret exposure, or Scoper promotion.
